Bash(cd D:/SPAG-4D && python_embed/python.exe -c "
import torch
from spag4d.gaussian_converter import equirect_to_gaussians, _estimate_normals_torch
from spag4d.spherical_grid import create_spherical_grid

device = torch.device\('cpu'\)
H, W, stride = 256, 512, 2
grid = create_spherical_grid\(H, W, device, stride=stride\)

depth = torch.full\(\(H//stride, W//stride\), 5.0\)
normals, conf = _estimate_normals_torch\(depth, grid.phi, grid.theta\)
print\(f'normals shape: {normals.shape}'\)
print\(f'conf range: [{conf.min\(\):.3f}, {conf.max\(\):.3f}]'\)

image = torch.randint\(0, 255, \(H, W, 3\), dtype=torch.uint8\)
depth_full = torch.full\(\(H, W\), 5.0\)

out = equirect_to_gaussians\(image, depth_full, grid, oriented_gaussians=True\)
print\(f'means: {out[\\"means\\"].shape}, scales: {out[\\"scales\\"].shape}, quats: {out[\\"quats\\"].shape}'\)
print\(f'opacities range: [{out[\\"opacities\\"].min\(\):.3f}, {out[\\"opacities\\"].max\(\):.3f}]'\)
print\('oriented_gaussians=True: OK'\)

out2 = equirect_to_gaussians\(image, depth_full, grid, oriented_gaussians=False\)
print\(f'oriented_gaussians=False: OK, means={out2[\\"means\\"].shape}'\)
" 2>&1)

        if info.endswith\('/'\):
            continue
        print\(f'  {info}'\)
